component.name: DeckTube
component.summary: YouTube for TV, tuned for the Steam Deck

description.p: DeckTube is an open source wrapper of YouTube Leanback (the console and Smart TV version of YouTube), tuned for the Steam Deck, with a built-in adblocker, SponsorBlock, full controller navigation, colour themes and a boot animation. It is the best way to experience YouTube on your handheld or media center. DeckTube is a fork of VacuumTube by shy.

ul.li: Settings that need a restart now offer to restart immediately
Built-in updater checks for new releases and asks before updating

description.p: Rename the sidebar entry to "DeckTube Settings"
Fix the DeckTube sidebar entry not showing its icon

ul.li: Boot animation now uses the full-quality video and hands off cleanly with no flash of the interface
DeckTube sidebar entry moved to the bottom of the guide with a clear icon
Touch overlay off by default, and tapping no longer summons controls when it is off
YouTube TV interface with full controller navigation, tuned for the Steam Deck
Ad blocking, SponsorBlock with selectable categories, and DeArrow
DeckTube sidebar entry opening a Clean Up panel: hide Shorts, remove the Ask (Gemini) button, end screens, info cards, autoplay, comments, and the "are you still watching" prompt
Playback speed control, preferred / maximum quality lock, and a sleep timer
Keep awake while a video is playing
Bundled colour themes (Catppuccin Mocha, OLED Black, Dracula, Nord, Gruvbox)
YouTube logo boot animation on launch
Steam Deck first-run defaults and GPU flags for smooth playback and animations
